pcaconnectorad.template.keyusage.CfnAbou: The key usage extension defines the purpose (e.g., encipherment, signature) of the key contained in the certificate.

pcaconnectorad.template.keyusage.Critica.Description: Sets the key usage extension to critical.

pcaconnectorad.template.keyusage.UsageFl.Description: The key usage flags represent the purpose (e.g., encipherment, signature) of the key contained in the certificate.
